utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 corresponding sections are present. Each section includes both the coverage type and an explicit cost element as required: health_coverage (cost provided), property_coverage (cost provided), travel_coverage (cost provided), additional_services (cost stated as included in total premium), total_budget (monthly and annual breakdown). They are fully specified per the format expectations, including costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three specific insurance products by name: LifeFirst Standard Plan (health), PrimeHome Premium Coverage (property), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan with Adventure Travel Coverage (travel). In the ground-truth ratings, LifeFirst Standard Plan appears under primary_health_coverage (rating 9). PrimeHome Premium Coverage appears under property_protection.home_content (rating 6). For travel, the plan name corresponds to PrimeTravel Premium Plan combined with Adventure Travel Coverage. PrimeTravel Premium Plan has rating 6 in mobility_coverage.travel_insurance, and Adventure Travel Coverage has rating 10 in travel_enhancement_services. The 'Global Assistance Partner Verification' service does not appear in the ground-truth list, so it cannot be mapped.
